RuleSet.Name: src/schemapubobj/ISchemaPubSchemaObj.java

GenFile.Name: fileISchemaPubSchemaObjJava
GenFile.BasePackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower DefPubSchemaName$/src/main/java
GenFile.SubPackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower DefPubSchemaName$obj

RuleSet.GenRule: public I$PubSchemaName$Schema get$DefPubSchemaName$BackingStore(); public void set$DefPubSchemaName$BackingStore(I$PubSchemaName$Schema $lower DefPubSchemaName$BackingStore);

/** * Release any prepared statements acquired by this connection. *

* Resets the prepared statements so they can acquire the new value of * setDbSchemaName(). */ void releasePreparedStatements();
